prerequisites.value: Point-Blank Shot, Precise Shot, base attack bonus +5.

description.value: **Benefit:** You can spend a move action to steady your shot. When you do, you gain a +4 bonus on your next ranged attack roll before the end of your turn. Combat Trick Source PPC:WMH Note If using the optional Stamina Pool rules, the following trick may be used with this feat. Combat Trick: You can spend 5 stamina points to use Bullseye Shot as a swift action.
